# generated by generator/generate.das - DO NOT EDIT BY HAND
# The skip ratchet: everything the generator could not emit, with its reason.
# CI regenerates this report and diffs it against the committed copy - if an
# emitter change grows a skip tail, the diff fails and the drop must be justified
# by regenerating the report in the same commit.
